# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters: 
  appName:
    type: string
    default: "ci-cd"
  objectId:
    type: string
  tenantId:
    type: string
resources: 
 - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
   name: '{concat(parameters('appName'), '/', copyIndex())}'
   apiVersion: '2015-07-01'
   properties:
     roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c' #Contributor
     principalId: {parameters('objectId')}
   dependsOn: 
     - subscription({subscriptionId})
